channel.title: Agent on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Agent on Arrans github.io

item.title: 2noise/ChatTTS
item.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Get answers to your questions, whether they be online or in your own notes. Use online AI models (e.g gpt4) or private, local LLMs (e.g llama3). Self-host locally or use our cloud instance. Access from Obsidian, Emacs, Desktop app, Web or Whatsapp.

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: princeton-nlp/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using GPT-4, or your LM of choice. It solves 12.47% of bugs in the SWE-bench evaluation set and takes just 1 minute to run.
